CVE-2017-18924.7b5a54f81f4ffcaa4d7eda2101be06d89d5107c5:
chore(deps): replace local-web-server with serve, migrate oauth2-server to @node-oauth/oauth2-server

- Replace local-web-server (unmaintained) with serve for the serve-static script
- Migrate oauth2-server to @node-oauth/oauth2-server v5 to address CVE-2017-18924 and CVE-2020-26938
  - Rewrite E2E OAuth2 test server to use v3+ Request/Response API
  - Rewrite model to use synchronous return values and v3+ method signatures (saveToken, grants on client)
- Fix jest.artifact.config.js testEnvironment to use explicit jest-environment-jsdom
- Update test/unit/core/utils.js to use history.pushState instead of deleting window.location

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

CVE-2020-26938.7b5a54f81f4ffcaa4d7eda2101be06d89d5107c5:

- Replace local-web-server (unmaintained) with serve for the serve-static script
- Migrate oauth2-server to @node-oauth/oauth2-server v5 to address CVE-2017-18924 and CVE-2020-26938
  - Rewrite E2E OAuth2 test server to use v3+ Request/Response API
  - Rewrite model to use synchronous return values and v3+ method signatures (saveToken, grants on client)
- Fix jest.artifact.config.js testEnvironment to use explicit jest-environment-jsdom
- Update test/unit/core/utils.js to use history.pushState instead of deleting window.location

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

CVE-2026-27135.3c0a58d12c8e94369f3d356996cdd9d84e0f992e:
fix(docker): address CVE-2026-27135 nghttp2-libs vulnerability

Pin nghttp2-libs to >=1.68.1-r0 in Docker image to fix HIGH severity
CVE-2026-27135 (DoS via malformed HTTP/2 frames after session termination).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

CVE-2026-28390.9ced3791b605347e906b2560055a5b5c256e9045:
fix(docker): upgrade alpine packages to address HIGH severity CVEs

Explicitly pin minimum versions for libcrypto3, libssl3, musl, and
musl-utils to resolve Trivy-detected vulnerabilities in the Docker image:

- CVE-2026-28390 (HIGH): OpenSSL NULL pointer dereference DoS
  libcrypto3/libssl3 3.5.5-r0 → >=3.5.6-r0
- CVE-2026-40200 (HIGH): musl libc arbitrary code execution/DoS
  musl/musl-utils 1.2.5-r21 → >=1.2.5-r23

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

GHSA-QRMM-W75W-3WPX.01a3e55960f864a0acf6a8d06e5ddaf6776a7f76:
fix(security): disable reading config params from URL search params (#7697)

Reading configuration parameters from URL search params 
is by default no longer enabled. To re-enable it, set queryConfigEnabled
configuration parameter to true.

Functionally, this is a breaking change, but given we're just providing
a security vulnerability patch we're considering this a PATCH version bump
only.

Refs #4872
Refs https://github.com/swagger-api/swagger-ui/security/advisories/GHSA-qrmm-w75w-3wpx

* Dropdown classname improvements

* Dropdown move item focus function
